scripts.audit: echo "All deps are vendored — no dynamic install. Three.js r179 in assets/lm402*/three.core.js"

dependenciesNote: All runtime deps are vendored (Three.js r179, GLTFLoader r179) under assets/lm402*/ — no npm install needed for serving. This file exists so npm audit / Dependabot / security scanners have a manifest to read.
